utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check full specification per item: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, type, neighborhood) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (down_payment, mortgage_rate, mortgage_term, monthly_payment) — sufficiently specified with terms.
- legal_services: legal services with costs (provider, estimated_cost) — specified.
- moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (relocation_assistance, workspace_modification_budget) — costs provided, counts as moving arrangements.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (provided: property_survey_cost, land_transfer_tax). While utilities aren't listed, setup services are present with relevant costs; acceptable as rough coordination.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property_cost, down_payment, closing_costs, total_estimated_cost) — provided.
All items are present and reasonably fully specified per the required descriptions.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution mentions items across property, financing, legal services, moving services, and setup/surveys. We must match each to the closest named option in the ground-truth ratings. The property itself (specific Toronto address) does not correspond to any named property option in the ground truth, so it cannot be mapped. Financing specifies a mortgage but not one of the named financing products; however, it most closely corresponds to a purchase financing option, yet no explicit named option is given, so we cannot map it. Legal services specify a provider name not present in the ratings; we instead map by service type and cost: estimated_cost 1100 most closely aligns with Premium Legal Package (CAD $1200). Moving services list relocation assistance and workspace modification budgets, which do not match any named moving service; no mapping. Setup services include a property survey cost of 600, which aligns most closely with Full Structural Survey (price CAD $650). Land transfer tax is not in ratings. Therefore, we can only map: Premium Legal Package and Full Structural Survey.
